title: Chillax Lyrics Manjanathi Lyrics Velayutham Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Singers: Karthik, Charulatha Mani
Lyrics: Annamalai
Song: Chillax Chillax

Manjanathi marathu katta
Maiiya vachi mayakiputta
Naatu katta, townu katta
Rendu kalandha semma katta
Kaiee rendu oruttu katta
kannu rendum vetta vetta
Nejukulla ratham sotta edhuku varra kitta...

Sooriyane thaevaiyila vithudalaama
Rathiriya mattum inga vachikalaama
Thirupaachi meesayila sikkikalaama
Neeyaachu naanaachu paathukalama

Chillax Chillax chillax chillax Chillax
Chillax Chillax chillax chillax chillax (Manjanathi marathu katta..)

Yen udhattu saarathula, otti kolla vaada ulla,
Pathu viral theekuchiye, pathavaika vaadi pulla

Kattaboma peran, nee kathi meesa veeran
Mutham vachi pothikollu sethu poren
Maayavithaan neeyum, inga mayangiputten naanum
Aathangarai mohiniye,vaadi enna kattipudika

Chillax Chillax chillax chillax Chillax
Chillax Chillax chillax chillax chillax
Chillax baby.

Yen udambu panjumetha, kitta vandhu kaatu viththa
Un idupu vaalamatta,naan pudicha thaangamaata
Sandhu pondhu veedu,nee vandhu vilayaadu
Pattaa vaanda thaevayilla, kottaa podu

Vetila serthu, un maaraapatha korthu
ennanavo pannuriye nenjukulla ketta kanavu

Chillax Chillax chillax chillax Chillax
Chillax Chillax chillax chillax chillax (Manjanathi marathu katta..)

Sooriyane thaevaiyila vithudalaama
Rathiriya mattum inga vachikalaama
Thirupaachi meesayila sikkikalaama
Neeyaachu naanaachu paathukalama

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Chillax'?

The song 'Chillax' conveys a sense of fun and celebration, encouraging listeners to let loose and enjoy life.

What is the plot context of 'Chillax' in the movie Velayutham?

In Velayutham, 'Chillax' is featured during a lively sequence that showcases the protagonist's carefree spirit and zest for life.

Who are the singers and music director of 'Chillax'?

The song is sung by Charulatha Mani and Karthik, with music composed by Vijay Antony.

When was 'Chillax' released?

'Chillax' was released on August 20, 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song 'Chillax' from the movie Velayutham is a lively duet that encapsulates the joy of celebration and carefree moments. With its upbeat tempo and catchy lyrics, it invites listeners to dance and enjoy life to the fullest. The vibrant collaboration between Charulatha Mani and Karthik, paired with Vijay Antony's energetic composition, creates an atmosphere of happiness and excitement. This song is perfect for parties and celebrations, making it a favorite among fans.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Chillax from the movie Velayutham is a vibrant and energetic track that perfectly captures the spirit of celebration. With the dynamic vocals of Charulatha Mani and Karthik, combined with Vijay Antony's infectious beats, this song is sure to get you moving. Experience the joy and excitement that this collaboration brings to the dance floor!
stanzaMeanings: The flower of the forest is blooming, it has been enchanted. The village is lively, the town is lively. Two things combined make it great. Two hands are holding, both eyes are looking. Why is the chariot coming here?
Should we leave the sun behind? Can we just keep the chariot here? Can we get caught in the mustache of the Thirupaachi? Should we take care of each other?
Chillax Chillax chillax chillax Chillax Chillax Chillax chillax chillax chillax (The flower of the forest is blooming...)
Dheem dheem thananam, Dheem dheem thananam..
In my chariot, don’t hold back, inside, ten fingers are itching, let’s go, kids.
You are the great one, you are the warrior with the sword. I will kiss you and go. You are the illusion, and I have also fallen for it. Oh enchanting one, what are you going to do with me?
Chillax Chillax chillax chillax Chillax Chillax Chillax chillax chillax chillax Chillax baby.
My body is like a flower, it has come to bloom. Your beauty is unmatched, I can’t resist it. If you come to my house, let’s play. There’s no need for a fight, just let it go.
Let’s meet outside, whatever you want to change, let’s do it. I heard a dream in my heart.
Chillax Chillax chillax chillax Chillax Chillax Chillax chillax chillax chillax (The flower of the forest is blooming...)
Should we leave the sun behind? Can we just keep the chariot here? Can we get caught in the mustache of the Thirupaachi? Should we take care of each other?
